// comment: Deno configuration for the story-execution sandbox (src/sandbox/deno-entry.ts).
// runtime: The sandbox is launched by the Node server as: deno run --allow-none --v8-flags=--max-old-space-size=256 src/sandbox/deno-entry.ts
// isolation: --allow-none revokes filesystem, network, env, and subprocess capabilities. The only IO is stdio (JSON newline-delimited) back to the Node parent.
